name: MitoQ improved vascular endothelial function in healthy older adults
summary: A small crossover RCT supplies a human mitochondrial-redox physiological signal, but the endpoint is vascular surrogate physiology.
statement: In healthy older adults with impaired endothelial function, 20 mg/day MitoQ for 6 weeks improved brachial artery flow-mediated dilation, reduced plasma oxidized LDL, and was well tolerated in a randomized crossover trial.
population_or_model: Healthy older adults aged 60 to 79 years with impaired endothelial function
quantitative_note: Twenty participants completed the crossover trial.
caveats: Flow-mediated dilation is vascular physiology and not a durable disease, mortality, or healthy-lifespan endpoint.
MitoQ is a mitochondrial-targeted antioxidant and should not be generalized to NAD precursor effects.
